description_long: This is a modern military jet airplane with a sleek, angular fuselage and a camouflage paint scheme in shades of gray and black. The wings are sharply swept back and positioned low on the fuselage, giving the aircraft a streamlined, aggressive appearance. Twin vertical stabilizers rise from the rear, flanking two large jet engine exhausts, which are mounted close together. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage, featuring a smooth, enclosed canopy that blends seamlessly into the body. The undercarriage is not visible, suggesting retractable landing gear. The overall design emphasizes speed, maneuverability, and stealth, typical of advanced fighter aircraft.
description: A sleek, gray-black camouflaged military jet with swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a forward cockpit. The design is streamlined for speed and agility.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and wide, swept-back wings with twin vertical stabilizers visible behind.
description_view_1: Left rear oblique view highlights the sharply swept wings, twin engine exhausts, and the angular camouflage pattern along the fuselage.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the twin vertical stabilizers, closely set dual engine exhausts, and the broad wingspan.
description_view_3: Right rear oblique view emphasizes the wing sweep, engine placement, and the aerodynamic shape of the fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and no visible winglets; wings are designed for high-speed performance.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage, with visible exhaust nozzles.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers in a conventional tail arrangement, spaced apart at the rear of the fuselage.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear (not visible, but implied by the design and absence of fixed gear).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single-piece canopy, likely single or tandem seat.
